x-enumeration-literals.name: Installment Credit Plan
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Credit is repaid in fixed periodic payments over a defined term.

Comment:
Example:
Personal loan repaid monthly over 3 years.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Bullet Credit Plan
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Principal repaid at maturity.

Comment: 
Example: Corporate bridge loan

x-enumeration-literals.name: Balloon Credit Plan
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Smaller periodic payments with a large final payment at the end.

Comment: 
Example: auto financing

x-enumeration-literals.name: Revolving Credit Plan
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Flexible repayment within limit.

Comment: 
Example: credit card

x-enumeration-literals.name: Interest-Only Plan
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Pay interest periodically, principal later.

Comment: 
Example: investment loan

x-enumeration-literals.name: Overdraft Credit Plan
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Allows customers to withdraw more money than their account balance up to a predefined limit.

Comment:
Example:
Current account overdraft limit of €2,000

x-enumeration-literals.name: Line of Credit Plan
x-enumeration-literals.description:
A flexible credit facility where funds can be drawn as needed within an approved limit.

Comment:
Example:
Business working capital credit line.
